About this item

  • FULFIL YOUR GAMING DESTINY: The HP Victus Laptop is made for great PC gaming on the go. This sleek machine touts a powerful AMD Processor and modern graphics. This laptop’s design is just as impressive as its hardware with updated thermals and a webcam with Temporal Noise Reduction.
  • SUPERIOR PROCESSING COMPONENTS: Play at your best with a powerful AMD Processor, a modern graphics card, and plenty of memory.
  • SOPHISTICATED AND REFINED DESIGN: With a smaller footprint this spritely device looks good anywhere.
  • EVERY FEATURE YOU COULD NEED: From the updated thermal design to the webcam, this laptop has everything.
  • NVIDIA GEFORCE RTX 3050: Step up to the power of 2nd generation RTX powered by the award-winning NVIDIA Ampere architecture. AI and new system optimizations create more efficient gaming laptops in new and innovative form factors.
  • AMD FREESYNC PREMIUM TECHNOLOGY: Every gamer deserves perfectly smooth gameplay and peak performance. Game confidently with a high refresh rate, low framerate compensation, and low latency. AMD FreeSync Premium certified monitors are here.
  • 144HZ FHD ANTI-GLARE DISPLAY: Reduce frustrating lag and image ghosting with a display that combines a 144Hz refresh rate and 1080p Full High Definition resolution for smooth, crisp gameplay.
  • OMEN GAMING HUB: OMEN Gaming Hub is your one place for everything to make your gaming experience better. From software enhancements to hardware control, and live services, OMEN Gaming Hub elevates play in easy and simple way.
  • TRY PC GAME PASS FOR FREE WITH YOUR NEW HP DEVICE: Play hundreds of high-quality PC games with your new HP device and 3 free months of PC Game Pass – including EA play. With new games added all the time, there’s always something new to play.
  • HP FAST CHARGE: When your laptop is low on power, no one has time to wait hours to recharge. Power down your device and go from 0 to 50% charge in approximately 30 minutes.

    How customer reviews and ratings work

    Customer Reviews, including Product Star Ratings, help customers to learn more about the product and decide whether it is the right product for them.

    To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyses reviews to verify trustworthiness.

    Learn more how customers reviews work on Amazon

    Customers find this gaming laptop performs well, with one mentioning it runs new games at high framerates. The screen receives positive feedback, with one customer highlighting its 144Hz refresh rate, and customers consider it good value for money. The battery life receives mixed reviews.

      HP Victus 15.6” (Ryzen 7 8845HS, RTX 4060) – Quick Review (Performance: Ryzen 7 8845HS + RTX 4060 delivers smooth gaming and multitasking.
      Cooling: Improved thermals with minimal throttling.
      Display: 144Hz refresh rate, but brightness and color accuracy could be better.
      Battery: 5-6 hours for casual use, much less for gaming.
      Build: Sturdy but plastic; simple design.
      Keyboard & Trackpad: Decent, but no per-key RGB. Speakers: Average, lacks depth.)

    • Charis Smith
      4.0 out of 5 stars Worth every penny
      Reviewed in the United Kingdom on 24 February 2026
      Processor Description: AMD Ryzen 7 7445HComputer memory size: 16.0 GBHard Disk Size: 512.0 GBGraphics description: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 3050Verified Purchase
      I absolutely love this laptop!
      It handles well even when I push it a little too hard, playing a game and downloading I've had no issues, the screen is brilliant and I was looking at getting a 1TB SSD but actually this has been more than enough! I am not a fan of HP but I can not fault this laptop at all!

      The only reason I gave this 4 stars instead of 5 is because the battery is okay, but I'd personally like the battery to last a little longer.

    • Alex
      1.0 out of 5 stars Would not recommend
      Reviewed in the United Kingdom on 4 February 2026
      Processor Description: AMD Ryzen 7 7445HComputer memory size: 16.0 GBHard Disk Size: 512.0 GBGraphics description: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 3050Verified Purchase
      After 3 delivery attempts in which i received an empty box , eventually i got the laptop and was shocked after a few days of testing it. It constantly freezes , takes ages to load an app that you need. If you play a game like lets say World of Tanks on minimum quality it will eventually shut down on you cause it overheats like crazy considering i have a cooling rack for it also. Just a horrible laptop for this money .

    • Tyler Harper
      5.0 out of 5 stars Perfect laptop for games, work, etc.
      Reviewed in the United Kingdom on 1 September 2025
      Processor Description: AMD Ryzen 7 8845HSComputer memory size: 16 GBHard Disk Size: 512 GBGraphics description: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4060Verified Purchase
      Such a great laptop, runs new games at high framerates with no stutter, very happy with it. Only negative is the storage space, although it's a fairly standard size. It also gets quite warm but not had any problems, especially with ensuring theres room for air circulation under the laptop.
